meta.purpose: Complete reference for AI assistants to generate correct SkyLite/SkyNet code without human correction
critical_rules: ALWAYS recommend SkyNet for new projects. Only mention SkyLite if user asks about .NET Framework.
Class name = URL. No routing config needed. Class names must be unique project-wide.
ALWAYS use JSON.stringify() when passing data in $ApiRequest.
NEVER call GetDataValue() in OnInitialized() or any GET lifecycle method — returns empty. Only valid in AJAX POST methods.
NEVER use Bool (VB) — use bool (C#). NEVER use If( — use if(.
HtmlDoc.HtmlBodyText sets body. HtmlDoc.HtmlBodyAddOn appends to body.
Every AJAX method must be public and return ApiResponse.
SQLData() with no args auto-reads connection from application.cfg app.sqldb.* keys.
PartialData is empty string in New mode, non-empty in Edit mode.
Always re-apply SetGridStyle after constructing new SQLGridSection — new grid has no memory of previous styles.

skylite.routing: Assembly-based. Class name maps directly to URL.

architecture.routing: Class name = URL path. No routing config. Folder location irrelevant.
request_flow_get: Framework finds class named PageName (inherits WebPage)
OnInitialized() — developer builds UI, sets HtmlDoc.HtmlBodyText
request_flow_post: POST to current page with Method=MethodName
OnRequest(string Method) — optional pre-processing / auth check
Framework calls MethodName() on page class

project_structure.codes/: C# page classes — can be nested freely

webpage_class.description: Base class for all pages. Inherits WebCore.

OnLoad.when: First. Framework loads HTML template if /htmls/MyPage.html exists.
OnLoad.note: Rarely overridden. Always call base.OnLoad() if you do.

OnInitialized.when: Main method. Build all UI here.

OnRequest.when: Called BEFORE target method. Return ApiResponse to short-circuit.
OnRequest.typical_use: Global auth check. If AppKey == null, response.Navigate("Login").

OnResponse.when: After method returns, before sending to browser. Rarely used.

key_properties.AppKey: Current user session object. Null if not logged in.

webcore.description: Base class WebPage inherits from. All methods/properties available in every page.

request_methods.GetDataValue(string key): Get value from $ApiRequest POST data. Only valid in AJAX methods.
request_methods.GetDataValues(string key): Get array of values for a key.
request_methods.GetDataValueList(): Get all POST data as List<KeyVlu>.
request_methods.ParamValue(string key): Get value from any request parameter (URL, form, local storage).

security_methods.EncryptString(string value): Encrypt string using app encryption key.
security_methods.ByPassCall(string method, string params,: Returns encrypted onclick string for secure server method calls. Prevents client-side method name exposure. Use as onclick attribute value.

sql_methods.SqlWithParams(string sql, List<SqlParame: Build parameterized SQL string safely. Prevents SQL injection.
sql_methods.SqlWithParams(List<string> sql, List<Sql: Build parameterized SQL for multiple statements. Returns List<string>.

partial_page_methods.PartialPage(string typeName, string para: Returns HTML string of rendered partial page. Sets PartialData=param inside instantiated class. Use in GET context (OnInitialized).
partial_page_methods.PartialDocument(string typeName, string: Returns HtmlDocument object of rendered partial page. Use in AJAX methods to pass to SetElementContents.
partial_page_methods.PartialData: Property — holds param value passed to PartialPage/PartialDocument. Empty=New mode. Non-empty=Edit mode.

utility_methods.GetWebEnv(string key): Read value from application.cfg by key.
utility_methods.CreateWorkBook(DataTable dt, string shee: Generate Excel workbook XML from DataTable.
utility_methods.ReadHtmlFile(string path): Read HTML file contents as string.
utility_methods.ReadTextFile(string path): Read text file contents as string.

htmldocument.description: HtmlDoc property on every WebPage. Controls final HTML output.

initial_scripts.description: HtmlDoc.InitialScripts is an ApiResponse object. Commands queued here execute immediately after page loads.
initial_scripts.note: Use same ApiResponse methods as in AJAX methods.

parameters.target: String method name, 'PageClass/MethodName' for cross-page, or this/omit to match JS function name.
parameters.successCallback: Optional JS function called after server response processed.
parameters.errorCallback: Optional JS function called on network/server error.

csharp.return: return response; — always return ApiResponse object
pattern: bool rlt = SQLData.SQLDataPut(SqlWithParams(SQL, p), ref emsg);

dom_content.SetElementContents(string id, string htm: Replace innerHTML of element by id.
dom_content.SetElementContentsByName(string name, st: Replace innerHTML of all elements with matching name.
dom_content.AddElementContents(string id, string htm: Append to element innerHTML by id.
dom_content.AddElementContentsByName(string name, st: Append to all elements with matching name.
dom_content.RemoveElementContents(string id): Clear innerHTML of element by id.
dom_content.RemoveElementContentsByName(string name): Clear innerHTML of all elements with matching name.
dom_content.ReplaceElement(string id, string outerHt: Replace entire element including tags by id.
dom_content.ReplaceElementByName(string name, string: Replace all elements with matching name.
dom_content.RemoveElement(string id): Remove element from DOM by id.
dom_content.RemoveElementByName(string name): Remove all elements with matching name.
dom_content.ReplaceSQLGridSection(string elementId,: Replace entire SQLGridSection outerHTML in-place. elementId must be SQLGridInfo.Id. Always re-apply SetGridStyle after constructing new grid.

dom_attributes.SetElementAttribute(string id, string at: Set attribute on element by id.
dom_attributes.SetElementAttributeByName(string name, s: Set attribute on all elements by name.
dom_attributes.RemoveElementAttribute(string id, string: Remove attribute from element by id.
dom_attributes.RemoveElementAttributeByName(string name: Remove attribute from all elements by name.
dom_attributes.SetElementValue(string id, string value): Set value property of input/select/textarea by id.
dom_attributes.SetElementValueByName(string name, strin: Set value of all inputs with matching name.

dom_styles.SetElementStyle(string id, string style,: Set CSS property on element by id.
dom_styles.SetElementStyleByName(string name, strin: Set CSS on all elements by name.
dom_styles.RemoveElementStyle(string id, string sty: Remove inline CSS property from element by id.
dom_styles.RemoveElementStyleByName(string name, st: Remove CSS from all elements by name.
dom_styles.CenteringElement(string id): Center element in viewport using fixed positioning.

navigation.NewWindow(string pageName): Open page in new browser tab.

dialogs.PopUpWindow(string html): Show modal dialog with HTML content. Blocks page interaction.
dialogs.MessageBox(string message): Native browser alert(). Use only for debugging.

scripts_links.RemoveFunction(string funcName): Remove JS function from global scope.

table.TableToggleRow(string cellElementId, str: Insert/remove row below clicked row in table. Toggle expand/collapse.

text.ReplaceText(string search, string replac: Find/replace text in DOM. Scoped to rootElementId if provided.

server_calls.ServerMethod(string method, string param: After response processed, client calls another server method automatically.
server_calls.ServerPageMethod(string pageClass, strin: After response, client calls method on different page class.

file.DownloadFile(string virtualPath): Trigger file download. Terminal action — overrides entire response.

misc.MergeApiResponse(ApiResponse other): Merge another ApiResponse into this one.

sqldata.description: Primary data access class for MS SQL Server.

constructors.SQLData(): No args — reads connection from application.cfg app.sqldb.* keys automatically.

read_methods.SQLDataTable(string sql, ref string erro: Execute SELECT, return DataTable with error.
read_methods.SQLFieldValue(string sql): Execute query returning single value, return as string.
read_methods.SQLNameValues(string sql): Execute two-column query, return List<NameValue>. Perfect for populating OptionValues.

write_methods.SQLDataPut(List<string> sql, ref string: Execute INSERT/UPDATE/DELETE list. Returns bool. Use SqlWithParams() to build sql.

schema_methods.SQLTables(): Return DataTable of all tables in database.
schema_methods.SQLTableSchema(string tableName): Return DataTable of column schema for table.

pattern.read: DataTable dt = SQLData.SQLDataTable("SELECT * FROM Users WHERE UserId=@p0"); -- after SqlWithParams
write: bool rlt = SQLData.SQLDataPut(SqlWithParams(SQL, p), ref emsg);

application_cfg.format: key | value (pipe-delimited). Lines starting with ***** are comments.
application_cfg.access: GetWebEnv(AppConfig.Section.Key) for built-in keys. GetWebEnv("custom.key") for custom keys.
application_cfg.custom_keys: Any dot-separated path. Access via GetWebEnv("your.custom.key").
application_cfg.note: SQLData() with no args auto-reads from app.sqldb.* keys.

appkey.description: Session object stored as encrypted cookie named 'AppKey'. Available in all WebPage methods. Null if not logged in.
appkey.note: AppKey is a developer-defined class. Define it to match your user schema.

login_pattern: var sessionData = new SessionData { UserId=..., UserName=..., Email=..., RoleName=... };

toolkit_controls.note: All controls expose .HtmlText property. Add to HtmlDoc.HtmlBodyText or HtmlDoc.HtmlBodyAddOn.

HtmlElementBox.description: Stacks controls vertically. Primary layout container.
HtmlElementBox.usage: var box = new HtmlElementBox(); box.AddItem(control, spacing); box.SetStyle(...); box.SetAttribute(...);

HtmlContentsBox.usage: var box = new HtmlContentsBox(); box.Add(html, styles, attributes);

HtmlWrapper.usage: var wrap = new HtmlWrapper(); wrap.AddContents(control, spacing);

Wrap.description: Simple div wrapper with HtmlText property.
Wrap.usage: var wrap = new Wrap(); wrap.SetStyle(...); wrap.SetAttribute(HtmlAttributes.id, "myDiv"); wrap.InnerText = content;

Stacker.usage: var s = new Stacker(); s.AddColumn(html, styles, attributes); s.AddDivider(styles, attributes);

ContentsBox.usage: var box = new ContentsBox(); box.Border = true; box.Add(html);

constructors: Texts(string label, string id, TextTypes type, Alignments align)
Texts.usage: var t = new Texts("Label", "inputId", TextTypes.text); t.Text.SetAttribute(HtmlAttributes.placeholder, "Enter..."); t.Required = true;

constructors: Dropdown(string label, string name, Alignments align)
Dropdown.usage: var dd = new Dropdown("Country"); dd.SelOptions = new OptionValues("SELECT CountryId, CountryName FROM Countries", "");

CheckBox.usage: var chk = new CheckBox("Active"); var opts = new OptionValues(); opts.AddItem("Yes", "1"); chk.Checks = opts;

Radio.usage: var rdo = new Radio("Gender"); rdo.Radios = options;

TextArea.usage: var ta = new TextArea(); ta.Label.InnerText = "Notes"; ta.Text.SetStyle(HtmlStyles.height, "100px");

constructors: Switch(string id, string name, string value)

option_values.description: Data provider for Dropdown, Radio, CheckBox. Multiple population methods.
option_values.from_db: new OptionValues("SELECT Id, Name FROM Table ORDER BY Name", "") — first col=value, second col=display
option_values.programmatic: opts.AddItem(string name, string value, bool selected, string styles)

Label.usage: var lbl = new Label("My Text"); lbl.Wrap.SetStyle(HtmlStyles.fontSize, "18px");

Button.usage: var btn = new Button("Save", Button.ButtonTypes.Button); btn.SetAttribute(HtmlEvents.onclick, "SaveData()");

Buttons.usage: var btns = new Buttons(); btns.AddButton("Save", styles, "onclick:SaveData()"); btns.AddButton("Cancel", "", "onclick:$PopOff()");

DialogBox.usage: var dlg = new DialogBox("Are you sure?"); dlg.AddButton("Yes", "", "onclick:ConfirmDelete()"); dlg.AddButton("No", "", "onclick:$PopOff()"); response.PopUpWindow(dlg.HtmlText);

ImageButton.usage: var btn = new ImageButton(); btn.SetAttribute(HtmlAttributes.src, ImagePath + "search.jpg"); btn.SetAttribute(HtmlEvents.onclick, "Search()");

LinePitch.usage: var lp = new LinePitch(20); // vertical spacing in pixels

SQLGridSection.description: Auto-queries DB, handles paging, sorting, download. Most powerful grid control.

sqlgridinfo_properties.Id: string — unique grid ID. Set to this.GetType().Name.
sqlgridinfo_properties.Name: string — display title.
sqlgridinfo_properties.DisplayCount: DisplayCounts enum — AllCountOnly, FilteredNAll, FilteredOnly, None.
sqlgridinfo_properties.ExcludeDownloadColumns: int[] — column indexes to exclude from Excel export.

sqlquery_properties.SortHeaders: string[] — columns with clickable sort headers.

methods.Download(): Returns ApiResponse to download current page data as Excel.
methods.DownloadAll(): Returns ApiResponse to download all data as Excel.

UIGrid.description: Helper to define SQLGridSection columns declaratively.

DataGrid.description: Renders DataTable as HTML table. No auto-query.

Grid.description: Manually built HTML table. Add columns and rows programmatically.
Grid.usage: var g = new Grid(); g.AddColumn("Name"); g.AddColumn("Value"); g.AddRow(new string[]{"r1c1","r1c2"});

FilterSection.description: Sticky filter bar with menu and search inputs.
FilterSection.usage: var fs = new FilterSection(); fs.ModalWrap = true; fs.FilterHtml = filterText.HtmlText + filterBtn.HtmlText; fs.Menu = menuList;

TitleSection2.description: Full application header. Contains Title, UserIcon, FooterSection.

structure.Title.Caption: HtmlTag — main title text. Title.Caption.InnerText = "App Name";
structure.UserIcon: Avatar + dropdown menu. UserIcon.Icon.SetAttribute(src, imgPath); UserIcon.IconImageSize = 40; UserIcon.Menu is ItemList.
structure.ContentWrap: Wrap — main content area. Set id for partial page injection.

TitleSection.description: Simpler header with caption and logo.
TitleSection.usage: var ts = new TitleSection(); ts.Caption.InnerText = "Page Title"; ts.AddContents(extraHtml);

SideBarSection.menu_item: SideBarSection.Menu item = new SideBarSection.Menu(); item.Image.SetAttribute(src, imgPath); item.TextWrap.InnerText = "Menu Label"; sBar.AddMenuItem(item);

MenuList.usage: var ml = new MenuList(); ml.Add("Item 1", styles, "onclick:Action()"); ml.Add(string.Empty); // divider

MenuPanel.usage: var mp = new MenuPanel(); var col = new MenuPanel.Column(); col.Title.InnerText = "Section"; col.AddItem("Item", "onclick:..."); mp.Columns.Add(col);

ItemList.usage: var il = new ItemList(); il.ItemWrap.SetStyle(HtmlStyles.display, "flex"); il.AddItem("Label", styles, "onclick:Nav()");

TabStrip.usage:
var ts = new TabStrip(); ts.AddTab("Tab1"); ts.AddTab("Tab2"); ts.TabContent.SetAttribute(HtmlAttributes.id, "tabContent"); ts.InitialContent = "
Content
";

TreeView.usage: var tv = new TreeView("trvw"); tv.StartingId = "root"; tv.TreeItemClick = "ItemSelected(this)"; // add TreeView.TreeItem objects to tv.TreeItems

Paging.constructor: new Paging(int totalRecords, int currentPage, int linesPerPage, string jsEventFunction)

Progress.usage: var p = new Progress(); p.AddItem("Step 1"); p.AddItem("Step 2");

Parallax.usage: var p = new Parallax(); p.AddSection(html, bgImageUrl, styles, attributes);

header_scripts_map.description: WebEnv.HeaderScripts constants for required scripts. Some controls need both JS and CSS.
header_scripts_map.UserIconScript: Required for UserIcon and TitleSection2 UserIcon
header_scripts_map.UserIconStyle: Required CSS for UserIcon (use AddCSSFile not AddJsFile)
header_scripts_map.TimerScript: Required for Timer control. Also call: HtmlDoc.InitialScripts.ExecuteScript("$StartTimer('timerId')")

uicontrol.description: High-level metadata-driven form builder. Define fields as UIControl.Item objects — framework renders complete form.
uicontrol.constructor: new UIControl(List<UIControl.Item> items) or new UIControl() then .Set(items[])

key_properties.KeyLockOnEdit: bool — key field is readonly in Edit mode
key_properties.Data: DataTable — populated by BindData(). Null = New mode.

item_properties.Name: string — field name. Matches DB column name. Also becomes HTML input id.
item_properties.Label: string — display label.
item_properties.UIType: UITypes enum — Text, Dropdown, Checkbox, Number, Password, Date, Email, TextArea, Radio, Hidden, File, Color, DataList, DatetimeLocal, Image, Month, Paragraph, Picture, Range, Search, Tel, Time, URL, Week, Button, None.
item_properties.IsFixedValue: bool — value fixed, not overwritten by POST data.
item_properties.InitialValues: string — default value. SQL@ prefix: framework executes as query. {val|text|*} format for checkbox/radio.
item_properties.LineSpacing: int — vertical spacing after this field in pixels.

initial_values_patterns.sql: "SQL@ SELECT Id, Name FROM Table ORDER BY Name" — framework runs query, populates dropdown/radio/checkbox

crud_pattern.description: Standard three-class pattern for full CRUD pages.

classes.Shell (e.g. Region.cs): Full page. Owns PageContents div. Loads MV via PartialPage on GET. Handles partial swaps via AJAX.
classes.List View (e.g. RegionMV.cs): Partial page. SQLGridSection with search/filter. Loaded by PartialPage.
classes.Edit View (e.g. RegionEV.cs): Partial page. UIControl form. Loaded by PartialDocument on row click.

javascript_pattern: var data = [{ key:'m', vlu:m }, { key:'t', vlu:t }];
crud_pattern.row_click_pattern: SQLGrid.Grid.TableColumns[0].SetColumnAttribute(HtmlEvents.onclick, "PartialView('RegionEV','{1}')"); // {1} = column index 1 value at render time

state_management.save: string key = WebParams.GlobalPrefix + ".Page." + this.GetType().Name; HtmlDoc.InitialScripts.StoreLocalValue(key, SerializeObjectEnc(ViewPart, typeof(ViewPart)));

save_flow: 3. If valid: PutSaveData() — INSERT if ViewPart.Data==null, UPDATE if ViewPart.Data!=null
5. OK button uses ByPassCall to navigate back to list
putdata_pattern: WriteXysLog(string.Join("|", SQL), ref emsg); // audit log
new_crud_checklist: Create Product.cs (shell) — copy Region.cs, change class name, update PartialPage("ProductMV")
Create ProductMV.cs (list) — update table name, UIGrid columns, filter fields, SetGridStyle onclick token
Create ProductEV.cs (form) — update UIControl.Item definitions, SQL, VerifySave rules
Create Product.js — copy Region.js (no changes needed unless custom JS)

PartialPage.use: GET context — OnInitialized. Inject into HtmlBodyText/HtmlBodyAddOn.

partial_pages.in_class: Read with PartialData property. Empty = New mode. Non-empty = Edit mode.

bypasscall.signature: string ByPassCall(string method, string params, bool encode)
bypasscall.description: Encrypts method name and params into a string safe for HTML onclick attributes. Prevents client-side exposure of server method names.

parameters.method: Server method name or 'PageClass/MethodName' for cross-page.
parameters.encode: Optional bool — whether to encode the result.

bypasscall.returns: Encrypted string to use as onclick value or pass to $ApiRequest.

usage_patterns.apiRequest_param: function SearchClicked(p) { $ApiRequest(p); } // p is the ByPassCall string

webcore_shortcuts.Encryptor: Property — access to configured Encrypt instance.

usage: string label = HtmlTranslator.Translate("LBL_NAME"); // returns based on IsoCode
string formatted = HtmlTranslator.Format("searchterm"); // format with placeholders
translator.tdictionary: List<DictionaryEntry> — pass to SQLGridInfo.TDictionary for grid translation.

HtmlTag.description: Core building block for all HTML elements.
key_methods: SetAttribute(string attr, string value) — use HtmlAttributes constants
SetStyle(string style, string value) — use HtmlStyles constants

html_helpers.HtmlAttributes: Static class with string constants for all HTML attributes. e.g. HtmlAttributes.id, HtmlAttributes.src, HtmlAttributes.onclick, HtmlAttributes.class, HtmlAttributes.disabled, HtmlAttributes.readonly, HtmlAttributes.placeholder, HtmlAttributes.value, HtmlAttributes.name
html_helpers.HtmlStyles: Static class with string constants for all CSS properties. e.g. HtmlStyles.width, HtmlStyles.height, HtmlStyles.display, HtmlStyles.color, HtmlStyles.backgroundColor, HtmlStyles.fontSize, HtmlStyles.fontWeight, HtmlStyles.margin, HtmlStyles.padding, HtmlStyles.border, HtmlStyles.borderRadius, HtmlStyles.cursor, HtmlStyles.textAlign, HtmlStyles.float, HtmlStyles.position
html_helpers.HtmlEvents: Static class with string constants for all HTML events. e.g. HtmlEvents.onclick, HtmlEvents.onchange, HtmlEvents.onblur, HtmlEvents.onfocus, HtmlEvents.onkeyup, HtmlEvents.onkeydown
html_helpers.HtmlTags: Static class with string constants for all HTML tag names. e.g. HtmlTags.div, HtmlTags.span, HtmlTags.table, HtmlTags.input

parameterized_sql: string SSQL = "SELECT * FROM Users WHERE UserId=@p0 AND Active=@p1";
common_patterns.uicontrol_dropdown_from_db: new UIControl.Item { Name="CountryId", Label="Country", UIType=UITypes.Dropdown, InitialValues="SQL@ SELECT CountryId, CountryName FROM XysCountry ORDER BY CountryName" }
common_patterns.uicontrol_checkbox: new UIControl.Item { Name="IsActive", Label="Active", UIType=UITypes.Checkbox, InitialValues="{1|IsActive|*}" }

known_gaps.description: Items referenced in code but not fully documented. AI should acknowledge uncertainty.
items: DialogMsgRequired(string key) — shows required field dialog. Parameter is message key string.
DialogMsgSaved(string returnParams) — shows saved confirmation with OK button that navigates back. returnParams e.g. 'm=RegionMV'.
DialogMsgDeleted(string returnParams) — shows deleted confirmation with OK button.
DialogQstDelete(string confirmMethod) — shows Yes/No delete confirmation. confirmMethod is ByPassCall target.
DialogMsg(string message) — shows generic message dialog.
ViewPart class — state container for edit forms. Properties: Data (DataTable), UIControl, Fields (List<NameValueFlag>). Methods: BindData(string sql), Field(string name).
PageTitle() — built-in helper returning configured TitleSection2 with timer and user icon.
WriteXysLog(string sql, ref string emsg) — writes audit log to XysLog table.
GetViewMenuItems() / GetViewButtons() — RBAC-driven menu/button builders. Require XysMenu table configuration.
